titleStmt.title: SII 41.403: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 403. (A.R. No. 618 of 1905.) Tiṅgaḷūr, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Alagiyaraja-Perumāḷ temple at Tiṅgaḷūr.

p.hi: Koṅgu, Rājakēsarivarman Vīra Pāṇḍya, Year 18 = 1283 A.D.

summary.p: Registers a decision of the ūr and ūrāḷikaḷ of Tāḷūṉṟi alias Vikramachōḻa-puram to contribute some specified quantity of rice daily to the temple for feeding the śrivaishṇava pilgrims. [Palaeographically this inscription is interesting in that it has the script for the aydam letter in line 4].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirācakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya devaṟkut tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāniṉṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu patineṭṭāvatu Āvaṇimātamutal kuṟuppunāṭṭut tiṅkaḷūrc cuntarapāṇṭiya viṇṇakar nāyanār Aḻakiyapperu
māḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭan tāḷuṉṟiyāṉa vikramacoḻapurattu Ūrum Ūrāḷikaḷom Eṅkaḷ nāyaṉār Aḻakapperumāḷukku nāṅkaḷ cātaṉam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāyanāṟku nāṅkaḷ nirvār
ttu nāḷoṉṟukku ponṉāṭunāḻiyāl Uriarici Amutu ceytu Ippicātam Eṅkaḷ taṉmamāka tecāntiri śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku vaḻinaṭaiyāka cantrātityavarai yeṅkaḷ makkaḷ makkaḷ nāḷoṉṟai
kku Uriyarici celuttuvomākavum celuttum Iṭattu Aḵkam[Picture] The semi-vowel character ‘ah’ denoted by three dots may be one of its earliest occurrences.Eṟṟakkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Āṇṭoṉṟukku Arici kala nelirutūṇippataku nānāḻikkum paṇam Irupatum Āṭṭaivarai toṟum cantrā
tyarvarai celuttuvomākavum celuttāviṭil maṇkalan takattum veṇkalam paṟiccum Eṅkaḷaittaṭu
ttu maṟiccum koḷvatākavum Iccātaṉañ cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom tāḷuṉṟiyāṉa vikra
macoḻapurattu Ūrum Ūrāḷikaḷom Ikkoyil nampimāṟkum tiruccelvaveḷai
kkāṟaṟkum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum Ippaṭikkuc cakkaravatti cilaiceṭṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭiku cuntarapperumā
ḷ periyaperumāḷ tātan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ciriyān tappaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku māṇikkan tampirānatoḻaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikkup piḷḷan periyakūttaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ collac Icātaṉameḻutiṉen kāḷuṉṟik kaṇakan kaṭalaṭaicca perumāḷ tātan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.403 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
